notes: CTA-2045 (EcoPort) UCM -> eBus water-heater bridge. Publishes a bridge root (energy.ebus.device.bridge, capabilities info + connection) and a proxied water-heater child (energy.ebus.device.water-heater). The child also publishes soc and status nodes (energy.ebus.capability.soc / .status); those are defined as roles within the water-heater data model (0.2) and have no standalone versioned capability catalog yet, so they are not pinned separately here. flex reconciled to the post-rename capability at this commit (was dr); flex/request $format JSONSchema validation requires ebus-sdk[validation].
